messages.content:
Which of the following is true of a proxy contest?

a.
It prevents shareholders from opposing actions taken by the board of incumbent directors.

b.
It requires incumbent directors to replace insurgent directors of the board.

c.
It involves insurgent shareholders challenging incumbent directors.

d.
It forbids solicitation of proxies by the parties involved in such a contest.
c. It involves insurgent shareholders challenging incumbent directors.

The amount of money a drawer owes a bank after it has paid a check despite the drawer's account having insufficient funds is termed ________.

a.
acquired tenor

b.
undercurrent

c.
original tenor

d.
overdraft

When is the course of performance considered in a written contract?

a.
when there is a prior oral or written agreement statement contradicting the written agreement

b.
when oral modification is required for a written contract

c.
when the express terms of a written contract are not clear

d.
when a sale or lease contract is not evidenced by writing
c. when the express terms of a written contract are not clear.

An ordinary partnership is also known as a ________.

a.
limited liability company

b.
limited partnership

c.
general partnership

d.
sole proprietorship

________ are a panel of decision makers who are elected by the shareholders.

a.
Registered agents

b.
Resident agents

c.
Corporate officers

d.
Board of directors

If the EEOC chooses not to bring suit, it issues a(n) ________ to the complainant.

a.
right to sue letter

b.
affirmative defense

c.
filing date

d.
document of claim

The ________ requires a mortgage or deed of trust to be documented in the county recorder's office of the county in which the real property is located.

a.
compilation statute

b.
real property statute

c.
mortgage statute

d.
recording statute

Which of the following describes backward vertical merger?

a.
a vertical merger in which a customer acquires a supplier

b.
a vertical merger between two or more companies that compete in the same business and geographical market

c.
a vertical merger between two companies in similar fields whose sales do not overlap

d.
a vertical merger in which a supplier acquires a customer
d. a vertical merger in which a supplier acquires a customer.

An arrangement in which the shareholders transfer their stock certificates to a trustee is known as ________ trust.

a.
charitable

b.
purpose

c.
voting

d.
honorary
